verdict_reasoning: TGFB1 is a secreted cytokine with no transmembrane domain, GPI anchor, or covalent surface tether. Although it associates with cell surfaces indirectly via LTBP-integrin interactions and matrix deposition, the protein itself remains in equilibrium with the soluble pool and has no stable direct link to the plasma membrane. It is a canonical secreted soluble ligand, not surface-resident.
